hooks.command: FILE=$(node -e "process.stdout.write(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')).tool_input.file_path)"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>&1; PKG=$(echo "$FILE" | grep -o 'packages/[^/]*'); if [ -n "$PKG" ] && [ -f "$PKG/tsconfig.json" ]; then npx tsc --noEmit -p "$PKG/tsconfig.json" 2>&1; fi; fi
